label: Standard
welcomeSubtitle: EINWURF – Future of Democracy 01.2021 · Bertelsmann Foundation
welcomeDesc: This questionnaire measures right-wing extremist attitudes using 18 statements in 6 dimensions. For each statement, indicate how much you agree or disagree.
welcomeDisclaimer: Note: This test is not a professional diagnosis. The evaluation is based on the right-wing extremism scale by the Bertelsmann Foundation.
helpDesc: If you have questions about your results or are concerned, here you will find trusted counseling services and support resources near you.
helpMapHint: The map shows counseling centers against right-wing extremism (national coordination offices). Allow location access to find the nearest services.

helpEntries.title: Federal Agency for Civic Education (bpb)
helpEntries.desc: Information and background on right-wing extremism and democracy promotion.

helpEntries.title: Victim Counseling – RIAS Network
helpEntries.desc: Counseling and support for victims of right-wing, racist and antisemitic violence.

helpEntries.title: Mobile Counseling Against Right-Wing Extremism
helpEntries.desc: Counseling networks nationwide for those who want to engage against right-wing extremism.

helpEntries.title: Exit Programs for Right-Wing Extremism
helpEntries.desc: Support for people who want to leave the right-wing extremist scene.

helpEntries.title: Nummer gegen Kummer (Helpline)
helpEntries.desc: Free, anonymous counseling for youth and parents – including questions about extremism.

questions: In the national interest, under certain circumstances a dictatorship is the better form of government.
What Germany needs now is a single strong party that embodies the national community as a whole.
We should have a leader who governs Germany with a strong hand for the good of all.
We should finally have the courage for a strong sense of national pride again.
What our country needs today is a tough and energetic assertion of German interests abroad.
The highest goal of German policy should be to give Germany the power and standing it deserves.
Without the Holocaust, Hitler would be seen as a great statesman today.
The crimes of National Socialism have been greatly exaggerated in history writing.
National Socialism also had its good sides.
Foreigners only come here to take advantage of our welfare state.
When jobs become scarce, foreigners should be sent back to their home countries.
The Federal Republic is dangerously over-foreignized by the many foreigners.
Even today, the influence of Jews is too great.
Jews work more than other people with nasty tricks to get what they want.
Jews just have something special and peculiar about them and don't quite fit in with us.
As in nature, the stronger should always prevail in society.
Actually, Germans are by nature superior to other peoples.
There is valuable and worthless life.
